block_01: If you trade regularly, indicators are most likely a big part of your trading routine. But do you really understand how indicators work and why?
block_02: In this material, we look into what leading and lagging indicators are, how to determine the correct period and why divergence can be positive and negative.
block_03: This information is basic and important for anyone who wants to become an advanced user of indicators. Read on and get one step closer to building your perfect trading approach.
